question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/evm/properties/EvmProperties.java -> Scope: Medium: Shutdown of greater than or equal to 30% of network processing nodes without brute force actions, but does not shut down the network'] [Function: buildTransactionProperties()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `contracts.sidecars=` (empty string) property in `buildTransactionProperties()` to trigger a code path in the upstream consensus library that fails to parse an empty sidecar configuration, throwing an uncaught exception that crashes 30%+ of EVM execution threads?
